description: Measured-basis SLO derived from the maxima of ib-t010-e2-baseline@1.0.0 (seed 10010202) at ~1x estimated capacity, admission-sane-v1; exists so goodput@SLO can be reported with shed+stall adjacent. Not a production target.

provenance.source: inferbench e2-baseline raw events (1050 events scanned, unfiltered including warm-up)
provenance.notes: threshold = measured max 0.219s x 1.35 headroom, rounded up to 0.05 grid

provenance.source: inferbench e2-baseline raw events (1050 events scanned, unfiltered including warm-up)
provenance.notes: threshold = measured max 0.350s x 1.35 headroom, rounded up to 0.05 grid

provenance.source: inferbench e2-baseline raw events (1050 events scanned, unfiltered including warm-up)
provenance.notes: threshold = measured max 0.063s x 1.35 headroom, rounded up to 0.05 grid

notes: Per-request evaluation: statistic 'max' objectives read as per-request bounds. Derived from the named runs' own events (measured basis, slo.schema.json rule); re-derive when the target or topology changes.
